result.stdout:
Description:
  ApiStitch — OpenAPI client generator for .NET

Usage:
  ApiStitch.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  generate  Generate C# client code from an OpenAPI spec

commands.payload:
Description:
  ApiStitch — OpenAPI client generator for .NET

Usage:
  ApiStitch.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  generate  Generate C# client code from an OpenAPI spec

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate C# client code from an OpenAPI spec

Usage:
  ApiStitch.Cli generate [options]

Options:
  --spec <spec>                  Path or HTTP(S) URL to OpenAPI spec
  --project <project>            Path to .csproj; the project will be built and run to extract its OpenAPI spec
  --output <output>              Output directory for generated files
  --namespace <namespace>        C# namespace for generated types
  --client-name <client-name>    Client name override
  --output-style <output-style>  Output style: TypedClientStructured or TypedClientFlat
  --config <config>              Path to openapi-stitch.yaml config file
  --clean-output                 Delete stale generated files from previous runs
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
